properties.name: serviceId
properties.comment:
Diagnostic service ID value. 
It is recommended not to modify it because it meets ES95486 specifications.

properties.name: confirmPositiveResponse
properties.comment:
Determines whether the response value(Rx) is checked. 
YES value is recommended.

properties.name: protocol
properties.comment: Select a communication method.

properties.name: application
properties.comment: Depending on the specification, the pre/post procedure(Functional)code behaves differently.

properties.name: moduleId
properties.comment: Maximum 4BYTE hex value: CAN Identifier requested by Tester to ECU

properties.name: testerId
properties.comment: Maximum 4BYTE hex value: CAN Identifier responding from ECU to tester

properties.name: requestType
properties.comment: Use the Physical Request CAN ID.

properties.name: stminTx
properties.comment:
STmin value of tester : Set to 0xFFFFFF to automatically set the ECU to a value that responds to FlowControl. 
Non-36 services use STMin 10ms(standard S/W architecture R2.0).

properties.name: p2CanServerMax
properties.comment: P2CAN_SERVER_MAX, wait time from Tester Request CAN Frame to ECU Response CAN Frame, in ms.

properties.name: p2StarCanServerMax
properties.comment: P2*CAN_SERVER_MAX, Time to wait from ECU Response CAN Frame (Negative Response Code Pending) to ECU Response CAN Frame (Positive Response), in ms.

properties.name: DLC
properties.comment:
CAN-FD Protocol Only
If the application type is OTA, it operates as DLC15 regardless of the setting value.(CCU is the same)

properties.name: sourceIP
properties.comment: Ethernet protocol only - Transmitter IP address : The value set on the PC LAN card takes precedence and we recommend that you put the same value set on the PC.

properties.name: sourcePort
properties.comment: Ethernet Protocol Only - Transmit Port Number

properties.name: destinationIP
properties.comment: Ethernet Protocol Only - Receiver IP Address

properties.name: destinationPort
properties.comment: Ethernet Protocol Only - Receiver Port Number

properties.name: gatewayType
properties.comment:
Select Gateway Type
Ethernet SourceAddress-CCU: 0xCA35, ICU: 0xCC33

properties.name: dataBitRate
properties.comment: CAN-FD Protocol  Mbps(1-1Mbps/2-2Mbps) : default - 2Mbps

properties.name: NRC78Repetitiontimeout
properties.comment: The hold time value of the pending message (NRC78) (input unit is sec) / default:5min(300sec), Maximum:60min(3600sec)

properties.name: diagnosticSessionType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: aliveCheckMessageInterval
properties.comment: Ethernet Protocol Only - Unit Seconds

properties.name: dtcSettingType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: controlType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: communicationType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: algorithm
properties.comment:
Select the appropriate algorithm for your security. 
Refer to the manual for more information on security.

properties.name: vehicle
properties.comment:
Used by NSK Type. 
Enter vehicle type or manufacturer code.

properties.name: number
properties.comment:
Used by NSK Type. 
Please enter a security number. Condition : decimal number, Three-digits, 000~999

properties.name: accessMode
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: accessMode
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: routineControlType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: routineIdentifier
properties.comment: Maximum 2BYTE hex value

properties.name: routineControlOptionRecord
properties.comment: Maximum n BYTE hex value : Enter an option value suitable for the ECU.

properties.name: dataFormatIdentifier
properties.comment: It consists of two nibbles, the left side contains information about the compression method, and the right side is encryption-related information (HEX)

properties.name: addressAndLengthFormatIdentifier
properties.comment: 1Byte value divided by nibble code, Bit7~4 : length of memorySize parameter, Bit3~0 : address of memoryAddress parameter (HEX)

properties.name: memorySize
properties.comment: It is used to compare the total amount of data transmitted during the TransferData service with the memory size. (HEX)

properties.name: memoryAddress
properties.comment: The starting address of the server memory is where the data will be written. (HEX)

properties.name: maxNumberOfBlockLength
properties.comment:
hex value : If a value is not entered, it is set to maxNumberOfBlockLength, which is the response value of RequestDownload from the controller at runtime. If you enter a 
value, the controller maxNumberOfBlockLength response value is ignored and acts as the entered value.
Exception applied - protocol : CAN/CAN FD, application : OTA applied 
maxNumberOfBlockLength 514Byte including SID 1Byte and blockSequenceCounter 1Byte can be set to Length, 514Byte.

properties.name: seekAddress
properties.comment: hex value : Enter the starting address value to read from the ROM data.

properties.name: writeSize
properties.comment: hex value : This refers to the size of the ROM data to be transmitted. In typical cases, the memorySize is the same as that used by RequestDownload.

properties.name: infoType
properties.comment: OBD EMS

properties.name: resetMode
properties.comment: Default : 0x01(hardReset) and allows the controller to send a defined reset sub-function.

properties.name: transmitdata
properties.comment: hex value : Send arbitrary data

properties.name: dataIdentifier
properties.comment: For values from 0xF1B1 to 0xF1BA, startPos and format fixed values are used. startPos = 3, format = Process with full data received from the controller

properties.name: startPos
properties.comment: Location value starting from rom version in controller response code: startPos=0 is set to compare from readDataByIdentifier's Response Service ID.

properties.name: display
properties.comment: Convert to ascii value

properties.name: format
properties.comment: Starting from the location of the startPos, compare it with the RomVersion by the '#' total number

properties.name: time
properties.comment: Wait time between diagnostic services, default unit is ms.

properties.name: areaFormatIdentifier
properties.comment: Used by the duelmemory controller, setting the 'Area' values

properties.name: groupOfDTC
properties.comment: Clear fault code

properties.name: subFunction
properties.comment: reportSupportedDTCExtDataRecord

properties.name: extendedInfo
properties.comment: DTCExtDataRecordNumber

properties.name: serviceId
properties.comment:
Diagnostic service ID value. 
 ES95486 It is a value that meets the specifications, so it is not recommended to modify it.

properties.comment:
Determines whether the response value(Rx) is checked. 
YES value is recommended.

properties.comment: Select a communication method.

properties.name: application

properties.comment: P2CAN_SERVER_MAX, wait time from Tester Request CAN Frame to ECU Response CAN Frame, in ms.

properties.name: p2StarCanServerMax
properties.comment: P2*CAN_SERVER_MAX, Time to wait from ECU Response CAN Frame (Negative Response Code Pending) to ECU Response CAN Frame (Positive Response), in ms.

properties.comment: Maximum n BYTE hex value : Enter the appropriate option value for the controller.

properties.comment: The starting address of the server memory is where the data will be written. (HEX)

properties.comment: Wait time between diagnostic services, default unit is ms.

properties.name: groupOfDTC
properties.comment: Clear fault code

properties.name: subFunction
properties.comment: reportSupportedDTCExtDataRecord

properties.name: extendedInfo
properties.comment: DTCExtDataRecordNumber

properties.name: vehicleName
properties.comment: VehicleName

properties.name: ecuName
properties.comment: ECU Name

properties.name: hwPartNum
properties.comment:
HW Part Number [ standard F187 ]
a combination of English and numeric characters 10
Multiple part numbers can be set using the place divider '|'.
ex) PARTNUM001|PARTNUM002|PARTNUM003 ..... PARTNUM499|PARTNUM500

properties.name: swUnitID
properties.comment:
SW Unit ID
Select from 01-0F

properties.name: sourceVersion
properties.comment:
Software Version before performing the reprogram.
This field is not used for reprogramming; it is used as a differential DeltaECU reference.(For Patch Version, enter sourceVersion as ###)

properties.name: targetVersion
properties.comment:
Software Version after performing the reprogram.
After performing the reprogram, it is used as a success or failure determination field.

properties.name: dbVersion
properties.comment:
Vehicle Communication Database Version.
차량 통신 데이터베이스 버전. 입력 형식(XX.XX.XX)

properties.name: rom
properties.comment: ROM file name must be in English, numeric, or special characters only. [Do not enter Korean]

properties.name: creationDate
properties.comment: RomPack CreationDate

properties.name: askHashValue
properties.comment: hash value of the Askdll file(only half of it for security purposes)

properties.name: ota2compatibility
properties.comment: OTA Gen 2 compatibility

properties.name: updateType
properties.comment: OTA 1.5 template -update Type (SUMS Update) controller type of

properties.name: redundancy
properties.comment: OTA 1.5 template-Redundant transmission methods 이중화 제어기 업데이트 전송 방식 선택 백그라운드 전송 적용 : background/백그라운드 전송 미적용 : normal

properties.name: serviceId
properties.comment:
Diagnostic service ID value. 
It is recommended not to modify it because it meets ES95486 specifications.

진단 서비스 ID. 
ES95486-02(UDS) 사양에 맞춰 입력되어 있으며, 해당 값 수정 시 정상 리프로그램 수행이 되지 않을 수 있습니다.

properties.name: confirmPositiveResponse
properties.comment:
Determines whether the response value(Rx) is checked. 
YES value is recommended. 

 응답값 확인 여부. 기본 진단 서비스에 대해 YES 값을 가지며, 특별한 상황이 아니라면 YES로 입력 합니다.

properties.name: stminTx
properties.comment:
STmin value of tester : Set to 0xFFFFFF to automatically set the ECU to a value that responds to FlowControl.
Non-36 services use STMin 10ms. 

 0xFFFFFF 설정 시 flowControl에서 응답한 값으로 STMIN을 설정 합니다. 
 36 service(transferData)외 서비스는 STMinTx 10ms 입니다.
 36 service(transferData)는 0ms로 고정

properties.name: background_stminTx
properties.comment:
BackgroaundTransferdata STMin value. (Set over 1ms) 

 백그라운드 전송 시 STMin 값(메모리이중화에만 해당)

properties.name: p2CanServerMax
properties.comment:
P2CAN_SERVER_MAX, wait time from Tester Request CAN Frame to ECU Response CAN Frame, in ms. 

 ECU 응답 대기 시간(밀리초 단위)

properties.name: p2StarCanServerMax
properties.comment:
P2*CAN_SERVER_MAX, Time to wait from ECU Response CAN Frame (Negative Response Code Pending) to ECU Response CAN Frame (Positive Response), in ms. 

 pending(NRC 78) 메시지 대기 시간

properties.name: NRC78Repetitiontimeout
properties.comment:
The hold time value of the pending message (NRC78) (input unit is sec) / default:5min(300sec), Maximum:60min(3600sec) 

pending(NRC 78)을 송신하는 최대 시간으로 기본 5분이며 최대 60분까지 입니다. (초 단위)

properties.name: diagnosticSessionType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: aliveCheckMessageInterval
properties.comment:
Ethernet Protocol Only - Unit Seconds. 

 이더넷 제어기 한정으로 사용되며 초단위 입니다.

properties.name: skipTask
properties.comment:
Skip the procedure according to the defined value.
WIRELESS_BACKGROUNDTRANSFER=0x00,
WIRELESS_PROCESSINGPREPARATION=0x10,
WIRELESS_PROCESSING=0x20,
WIRELESS_ACTIVATE=0x30,
WIRELESS_VERSIONCHECKING=0x50U,
WIRELESS_ROLLBACKVERSIONCHECKING=0x60,
WIRELESS_ROLLBACK_PROCESS=0x70,
WIRELESS_ROLLBACK_ACTIVATE=0x80U,
WIRE_PROCESSING= 0x21,
WIRE_ACTIVATE= 0x31,
WIRE_VERSIONCHECKING=0x51 

 입력된 값에 따라 정의된 절차를 생략 합니다. 
WIRELESS_BACKGROUNDTRANSFER=0x00(무선 백그라운드 전송 절차),
WIRELESS_PROCESSINGPREPARATION=0x10(무선 preperation 절차),
WIRELESS_PROCESSING=0x20(무선 processing 절차),
WIRELESS_ACTIVATE=0x30(무선 activate 절차),
WIRELESS_VERSIONCHECKING=0x50U(무선 versionCheking 절차),
WIRELESS_ROLLBACKVERSIONCHECKING=0x60(무선 롤백 versionCheking 절차),
WIRELESS_ROLLBACK_PROCESS=0x70(무선 롤백 processing 절차),
WIRELESS_ROLLBACK_ACTIVATE=0x80U(무선 롤백 activate 절차),
WIRE_PROCESSING= 0x21(유선 processing 절차),
WIRE_ACTIVATE= 0x31(유선 activate 절차),
WIRE_VERSIONCHECKING=0x51(유선 vesionCheking 절차)

properties.name: dtcSettingType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: controlType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: communicationType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: algorithm
properties.comment:
Select the appropriate algorithm for your security. 
Refer to the manual for more information on security.

properties.name: vehicle
properties.comment:
Used by NSK Type. 
Enter vehicle type or manufacturer code.

properties.name: number
properties.comment:
Used by NSK Type. 
Please enter a security number. Condition : decimal number, Three-digits, 000~999

properties.name: skipTask
properties.comment:
Skip the procedure according to the defined value.
WIRELESS_BACKGROUNDTRANSFER=0x00,
WIRELESS_PROCESSINGPREPARATION=0x10,
WIRELESS_PROCESSING=0x20,
WIRELESS_ACTIVATE=0x30,
WIRELESS_VERSIONCHECKING=0x50U,
WIRELESS_ROLLBACKVERSIONCHECKING=0x60,
WIRELESS_ROLLBACK_PROCESS=0x70,
WIRELESS_ROLLBACK_ACTIVATE=0x80U,
WIRE_PROCESSING= 0x21,
WIRE_ACTIVATE= 0x31,
WIRE_VERSIONCHECKING=0x51 

 입력된 값에 따라 정의된 절차를 생략 합니다. 
WIRELESS_BACKGROUNDTRANSFER=0x00(무선 백그라운드 전송 절차),
WIRELESS_PROCESSINGPREPARATION=0x10(무선 preperation 절차),
WIRELESS_PROCESSING=0x20(무선 processing 절차),
WIRELESS_ACTIVATE=0x30(무선 activate 절차),
WIRELESS_VERSIONCHECKING=0x50U(무선 versionCheking 절차),
WIRELESS_ROLLBACKVERSIONCHECKING=0x60(무선 롤백 versionCheking 절차),
WIRELESS_ROLLBACK_PROCESS=0x70(무선 롤백 processing 절차),
WIRELESS_ROLLBACK_ACTIVATE=0x80U(무선 롤백 activate 절차),
WIRE_PROCESSING= 0x21(유선 processing 절차),
WIRE_ACTIVATE= 0x31(유선 activate 절차),
WIRE_VERSIONCHECKING=0x51(유선 vesionCheking 절차)

properties.name: accessMode
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: accessMode
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: routineControlType
properties.comment: 1BYTE hex value

properties.name: routineIdentifier
properties.comment: Maximum 2BYTE hex value

properties.name: routineControlOptionRecord
properties.comment: Maximum n BYTE hex value : Enter an option value suitable for the ECU.

properties.name: dataFormatIdentifier
properties.comment:
It consists of two nibbles, the left side contains information about the compression method, and the right side is encryption-related information (HEX) 

 두 개의 니블로 구성되어 있으며, 왼쪽에는 압축 방식에 대한 정보가, 오른쪽에는 암호화 관련 정보(16진수)가 포함되어 있습니다.

properties.name: addressAndLengthFormatIdentifier
properties.comment:
1Byte value divided by nibble code, Bit7~4 : length of memorySize parameter, Bit3~0 : address of memoryAddress parameter (HEX) 

 1바이트 값은 니블 코드로 나뉘며, 비트 7-4는 memorySize 파라미터의 길이를, 비트 3-0은 memoryAddress 파라미터의 주소를 나타냅니다(16진수).

properties.name: memorySize
properties.comment:
It is used to compare the total amount of data transmitted during the TransferData service with the memory size. (HEX) 

 TransferData 서비스 중 전송된 데이터의 총량을 memorySize와 비교하는 데 사용됩니다. (16진수)

properties.name: memoryAddress
properties.comment:
The starting address of the server memory is where the data will be written. (HEX) 

 ECU 메모리에 쓰여질 시작 주소 값 입니다.

properties.name: maxNumberOfBlockLength
properties.comment:
hex value : If a value is not entered, it is set to maxNumberOfBlockLength, which is the response value of RequestDownload from the controller at runtime. If you enter a 
value, the controller maxNumberOfBlockLength response value is ignored and acts as the entered value.
Exception applied - protocol : CAN/CAN FD, application : OTA applied 
maxNumberOfBlockLength 4095(0xFFF) Byte including SID 1Byte and blockSequenceCounter 1Byte can be set to Length, 4095(0xFFF) Byte. 16진수 값: 값이 입력되지 않으면 실행 시 컨트롤러의 RequestDownload 응답 값인 maxNumberOfBlockLength로 설정됩니다. 값을 입력하면 컨트롤러의 maxNumberOfBlockLength 응답 값이 무시되고 입력된 값으로 동작합니다. 예외 적용 - 프로토콜: CAN/CAN FD, 애플리케이션: OTA 적용. maxNumberOfBlockLength는 SID 1바이트와 blockSequenceCounter 1바이트를 포함하여 최대 4095(0xFFF) 바이트로 설정할 수 있습니다. 

16진수 값: 값이 입력되지 않으면 실행 시 컨트롤러의 RequestDownload 응답 값인 maxNumberOfBlockLength로 설정됩니다. 값을 입력하면 컨트롤러의 maxNumberOfBlockLength 응답 값이 무시되고 입력된 값으로 동작합니다. 예외 적용 - 프로토콜: CAN/CAN FD, 애플리케이션: OTA 적용. maxNumberOfBlockLength는 SID 1바이트와 blockSequenceCounter 1바이트를 포함하여 최대 4095(0xFFF) 바이트로 설정할 수 있습니다

properties.name: seekAddress
properties.comment:
hex value : Enter the starting address value to read from the ROM data. 

 16진수 값: ROM 데이터에서 읽기 시작할 주소 값을 입력합니다.

properties.name: writeSize
properties.comment:
hex value : This refers to the size of the ROM data to be transmitted. In typical cases, the memorySize is the same as that used by RequestDownload. 

 16진수 값: 전송할 ROM 데이터의 크기를 나타냅니다. 일반적으로 memorySize는 RequestDownload에서 사용된 것과 동일합니다.

properties.name: infoType
properties.comment: OBD EMS

properties.name: resetMode
properties.comment: Default : 0x01(hardReset) and allows the controller to send a defined reset sub-function.

properties.name: transmitdata
properties.comment: hex value : Send arbitrary data

properties.name: dataIdentifier
properties.comment:
For values from 0xF1B1 to 0xF1BA, startPos and format fixed values are used. startPos = 3, format = Process with full data received from the controller 

 0xF1B1에서 0xF1BA 값의 경우, startPos와 format은 고정된 값이 사용됩니다. startPos = 3, format = 제어기에서 수신된 전체 데이터로 처리됩니다.

properties.name: startPos
properties.comment:
Location value starting from rom version in controller response code: startPos=0 is set to compare from readDataByIdentifier's Response Service ID. 

 제어기에서 응답 시 ROM 버전의 시작 위치 값: startPos=0으로 설정되어 readDataByIdentifier의 응답 서비스 ID에서 부터 비교를 시작합니다.

properties.name: endPos
properties.comment: OTA 사양 0xF187(partnumber) - 10자리 고정 / 0xF1B1~0xF1BA(swversion) - 제어기 응답값에 따라 동적처리

properties.name: display
properties.comment: Convert to ascii value

properties.name: time
properties.comment: Wait time between diagnostic services, default unit is ms.

properties.name: areaFormatIdentifier
properties.comment: Used by the duelmemory controller, setting the 'Area' values

properties.name: groupOfDTC
properties.comment: Clear fault code

properties.name: subFunction
properties.comment: reportSupportedDTCExtDataRecord

properties.name: extendedInfo
properties.comment: DTCExtDataRecordNumber

properties.name: comment
properties.comment: Release Note

properties.name: documentVersion
properties.comment:
About the current template version 

현재 템플릿의 버전 정보

properties.name: vehicleName
properties.comment:
VehicleName 

 차종명

properties.name: ecuName
properties.comment:
ECU Name 

 제어기명

properties.name: updateStandard
properties.comment:
2nd Generation Software Update Standardization Enablement Applicable 

 2세대 소프트웨어 업데이트 표준화 적용 여부

properties.name: ucm
properties.comment:
ucm remediation status 

 UCM 업데이트 적용 여부 선택 
- Adaptive AUTOSAR UCM Client 적용 : TRUE
- Adaptive AUTOSAR UCM Client 미적용 : FALSE

properties.name: bootloader
properties.comment:
Whether to apply bootloader area reprogramming 

 부트로드 영역 업데이트 포함 여부 선택
- 바이너리 파일 내 부트로드 영역 업데이트 내용 포함 : TRUE
- 바이너리 파일 내 부트로드 영역 업데이트 내용 미포함 : FALSE

properties.name: swType
properties.comment:
SW Update Type 

 소프트웨어 업데이트 대상 유형 선택 
- Firmware OTA 대상: Firmware 
- Application OTA 대상: Application

properties.name: executionType
properties.comment:
SW Update Execution Type 

 소프트웨어 업데이트 실행 유형 선택 
- Application install SW PKG : Install 
- Application update SW PKG : Update 
- Application remove SW PKG : Remove

properties.name: gate
properties.comment:
Development/mass production of the target model of the SW package 

 소프트웨어 패키지의 개발/양산 여부선택 
- 소프트웨어 패키지 개발단계 : dev 
- 소프트웨어 패키지 양산단계 : sop

properties.name: isEnableOTA
properties.comment:
Vehicle system OTA target

OTA 대상 제어기 여부

properties.name: updateType
properties.comment:
Update method  SUMS 

 업데이트 타입 선택 
- 이중화 : memoryswap 
- 이중화+차분 : delta+memoryswap

properties.name: redundancy
properties.comment:
Redundant transmission methods 

이중화 제어기 업데이트 전송 방식 선택
- 백그라운드 전송 적용 : background
-백그라운드 전송 미적용 : normal

properties.name: networkType
properties.comment: communication network method

properties.name: ethProtocol
properties.comment: communication network method

properties.name: requestId
properties.comment: Maximum 4BYTE hex value: CAN Identifier requested by Tester to ECU

properties.name: responseId
properties.comment: Maximum 4BYTE hex value: CAN Identifier responding from ECU to tester

properties.name: sourceIP
properties.comment: Transport IP (Client) [ex) 10.0.128.0]

properties.name: sourcePort
properties.comment:
- transport Port(Client) 
 For the CCU2 generation, only the DoIP protocol is supported, and the source port is automatically dynamically allocated (49152~65535) during communication, regardless of the input value. 
 The OS automatically assigns the port when the socket is connected, so it does not need to be manually entered.
 For the first generation of CCU, only the EthDiag protocol is supported, and a source port must be entered because the source port is used to attempt the socket connection 

 CCU2세대의 경우 DoIP 프로토콜만 지원하며 sourcePort는 입력값에 상관 없이 통신 시 자동으로 동적 할당(49152~65535) 합니다.

properties.name: destinationIP
properties.comment: receiveIP (Server)[ex) 10.0.6.0]

properties.name: destinationPort
properties.comment:
- receivePort(Server) 
 For the CCU2 generation, only the DoIP protocol is supported, and the port is set to 13400. When supporting CCU2, you must enter the port number as 13400 
 If supporting CCU1, use the EthDiag protocol and enter the appropriate port number. 

 CCU2세대의 경우 DoIP 프로토콜만 지원하며, port는 13400으로 지정되어 있습니다. CCU2를 지원하는 경우 port 번호는 13400으로 입력해야 합니다. 
만약 CCU1을 지원하는 경우 EthDiag 프로토콜을 사용하며 알맞는 port 번호를 입력하면 됩니다.

properties.name: p6Time
properties.comment: p6Time [in ms]

properties.name: dataBitRate
properties.comment:
CAN-FD Protocol Mbps (1-1Mbps/2-2Mbps)
default - 2Mbps 

 CAN-FD 프로토콜 사용 시 설정되는 dataBitRate 값이며, 제어기에 맞는 dataBitRate 값을 설정하지 않으면 통신이 되지 않을 수 있습니다.

properties.name: rom
properties.comment:
ROM file name must be in English, numeric, or special characters only. 

 ※ ROM 파일 경로에 한글이 포함되지 않아야 합니다.

properties.name: partNumber
properties.comment:
HW Part Number [ standard F187 ]
a combination of English and numeric characters 10
Multiple part numbers can be set using the place divider '|'.
ex) PARTNUM001|PARTNUM002|PARTNUM003 ..... PARTNUM499|PARTNUM500

HwPartNum[F187] : 영어와 숫자로 구성된 10자리 문자이며, 여러 개의 HwPartNum을 구성하려면 구분자 '|'를 사용하여 구성할 수 있습니다. 
 예: PARTNUM001|PARTNUM002|PARTNUM003 ..... PARTNUM499|PARTNUM500

properties.name: unit
properties.comment:
SW Unit ID
Select from 01-0F

properties.name: sourceVersion
properties.comment:
Software Version before performing the reprogram.
This field is not used for reprogramming; it is used as a differential DeltaECU reference.(For Patch Version, enter sourceVersion as ###)

 리프로그램 업데이트 전 소프트웨어 버전. 이 값은 리프로그램 시 사용되지 않으며, Delta 제어기(차분제어기)와 차별화 하기 위해 참조 되는 값입니다.(차분 제어기 Patch 버전의 경우 sourceVersion을 ###으로 입력)

properties.name: targetVersion
properties.comment: Software...

properties.name: dbVersion
properties.comment:
Vehicle Communication Database Version.
차량 통신 데이터베이스 버전.입력 형식(XX.XX.XX)

properties.name: creationDate
properties.comment:
RomPack CreationDate 

 롬패키지 생성 일자

properties.name: askHashValue
properties.comment:
hash value of the Askdll file(only half of it for security purposes)

 롬패키지 생성 시 입력한 ASK DLL 파일의 hash 값으로 전체 hash 값의 절반만 표시합니다. 이는 롬패키지 생성 시 입력한 target_ecu_code_list.xml파일의 ASK DLL hask 비교 목적으로 제공되며 리프로그램 진행에 사용되지 않는 값 입니다.
